persona: PhD researcher, longitudinal study N=50, 4 waves over 6 months
prompt_to_designer: Consented cohort. Same 50 respondents at wave 0, +6wk, +12wk, +24wk. Voice interview each wave. Show theme-evolution over time in /insights. Consent audit trail must be intact for publication.
expected_outline_topics: current relationship with the technology under study
would you re-consent for wave N+1

sample_answers.text: At wave 0 I used it maybe twice a week, mostly for casual queries.
Since last wave it's become part of my morning routine — I now dictate my journal to it.
I started using it to argue with myself before big decisions. That wasn't planned.
I quit it for 8 days after it hallucinated a citation for my dissertation.
Yes, I'll re-consent. The interviews are honestly making me think more clearly about my own use.

expected_themes: usage evolves from casual to daily-ritual by wave 2
hallucinated-citation event is a durable trust rupture
high re-consent rate — respondents report meta-cognitive benefit
theme-evolution chart is the North-Star deliverable
